sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Class System
special_mechanics.description: Characters reach level 18 to unlock first class change (Light or Dark), and level 38 for optional second class change. Each class provides different skills and stat improvements.

special_mechanics.name: Werewolf Transformation (Kevin)
special_mechanics.description: Character Kevin transforms into werewolf when fighting at night, greatly increasing attack power.

special_mechanics.name: Day/Night Cycle
special_mechanics.description: Calendar system with elemental days affecting magic potency. Day/night transitions affect enemy spawns and behavior (some enemies sleep at night).

tier_notes: Tier 1 game with no empirical physics documentation available. Sources contain ROM metadata, general gameplay description, and story/development information but no movement physics parameters. This is an action RPG with top-down perspective where movement physics are not typically documented.
